claimText: The Plan to Accelerate the Expansion and Resilience of Power Grids is supported by the Green Grids Initiative (GGI).
evidenceExcerpt: Plan to Accelerate the Expansion and Resilience of Power Grids: Supported by Green Grids Initiative (GGI).
examUse: Correct-pair question matching climate initiatives with their supporting alliances.
distractorHooks: Global Energy Interconnection Development and Cooperation Organization (GEIDCO)

claimText: The Plan to Accelerate Coal Transitions (PACT) is supported by the Powering Past Coal Alliance (PPCA).
evidenceExcerpt: Plan to Accelerate Coal Transitions (PACT): Supported by Powering Past Coal Alliance (PPCA) to fast-track the transition from coal to clean energy.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching climate initiatives with their supporting alliances.

claimText: The Belém 4x Pledge aims to quadruple the use of sustainable fuels, such as hydrogen and biofuels, by 2035 compared to 2024 levels.
evidenceExcerpt: Objective is to quadruple the use of sustainable fuels (hydrogen, biofuels, e-fuels) by 2035 compared to 2024 levels
examUse: Statement-based question on the specific targets and timelines of the Belém 4x Pledge.
distractorHooks: Doubling the use of sustainable fuels by 2050

claimText: The progress of the Belém 4x Pledge on Sustainable Fuels will be tracked by the International Energy Agency (IEA).
evidenceExcerpt: with progress tracked by the IEA.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the tracking agency for the Belém 4x Pledge.

claimText: India is a participant in the Belém 4x Pledge on Sustainable Fuels.
evidenceExcerpt: Belém 4x Pledge on Sustainable Fuels: Participants include Italy, Japan, India and Brazil.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's participation in international climate pledges.
distractorHooks: India opted out of the Belém 4x Pledge
